common.confirmDeleteBody: It moves to Recently deleted for 30 days.

auth.welcomeSub: Subjects, deadlines, revision, receipts. One place, zero chaos.
auth.resetSent: Check your inbox — reset link sent.
auth.guestCta: Create an account to save your work
auth.authFailed: Couldn't sign you in. Check the details?
auth.notConfigured: No server configured — try demo mode instead.

onboarding.nameSub: First name is fine. Nicknames encouraged.
onboarding.nameRequired: We need something to call you
onboarding.schoolSub: Search your school — or add it if we don't know it yet.
onboarding.countrySub: Helps with exam boards and dates. Optional.
onboarding.trackSub: This tunes year groups and exam language.
onboarding.subjectSub: Pick a colour you'll be happy staring at.
onboarding.finishSub: We've set up your dashboard and dropped in three starter tasks.

home.doNextEmptySub: Add a task or enjoy the silence.
home.streakSub: Do one task to start one

demo.banner: Demo mode — your data lives on this device
demo.cta: Create an account to save your work

consent.title: Help make Markd better?
consent.body: We'd like to collect anonymous usage stats (which features get used, where things break). Nothing personal, no ads, no selling. Crash reports are separate and always minimal.
consent.note: You can change this anytime in Settings.
